name: Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Vegetable (e.g., bok cho), cut to a uniform size
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the pan until very hot, then add oil. Stir fry garlic until fragrant.
2. Add the prepared vegetables and stir fry for 1 minute.
3. Sprinkle with a pinch of sugar and 2 tablespoons water. Cover and steam for 1 minute.
- Spinach and bok cho will be tender-crisp at this point. Broccoli and pea pods will require an additional 30 to 60 seconds of cooking.
Variations:
1. Use ginger or green onion instead of garlic.
2. Decrease water to 1 tablespoon and add 1/2 tablespoon each of cooking wine and soy sauce.
3. Mix vegetables (as long as they cook at similar rates). Experiment and enjoy.
